Theorem simplr 778
Description: Simplification of a conjunction. (Contributed by NM, 20-Mar-2007.)
Assertion
Ref Expression
simplr ⊢ (((𝜑 ∧ 𝜓) ∧ 𝜒) → 𝜓)
Proof of Theorem simplr
StepHypRef Expression
1 id 22 . 2 ⊢ (𝜓 → 𝜓)
21ad2antlr 737 1 ⊢ (((𝜑 ∧ 𝜓) ∧ 𝜒) → 𝜓)
